final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed technical exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 camera, showing all components with labeled part names.

Style/medium: technical illustration with the clean precision of industrial design documentation
Composition: exploded axonometric view, components floating in logical disassembly order from front-left to back-right, each part with a fine leader line to its label
Subject: Sony A7 camera fully disassembled — body shell, sensor assembly, shutter mechanism, mirrorless mount, EVF unit, LCD hinge, battery compartment, control dials, buttons, ports, circuit boards, and all internal mechanical parts
Scene/backdrop: neutral studio gray gradient, generous breathing room around the exploded assembly
Lighting/mood: even diffused studio lighting that reveals surface details and material differences without drama
Color palette: neutral graphite and silver tones, Sony's characteristic matte black body, subtle metallic accents on screws and contacts
Materials/textures: matte black polycarbonate shell, brushed magnesium alloy frame, glass sensor cover, rubber grip texture, printed circuit green
Text (verbatim): Sony A7
Constraints: all major components visible and spatially separated, leader lines clear and unobstructed, labels positioned for readability, accurate Sony A7 form factor
Avoid: cluttered overlapping parts, illegible small labels, decorative flourishes, photorealistic rendering that obscures technical clarity
